creator: wlloyd@tolstoy.mpd.ca
text:
Update to the FAQ.

Most URL's (except thoese that need it) are now relative.  
	Mailing list and search stuff is still hard coded to www.freebsd.org

Removed information that has been moved to the handbook.
	Like most of the serial port stuff

Updates for other questions.

I have made a lot more pointers to the handbook.
 
Copy also sent to pds@freebsd.org
